prompt:
Scene:
Same synthetic model identity as the reference image, now standing under a covered city sidewalk on a rainy evening, wet pavement reflections, soft neon bounce light, and a clean fashion-catalog square crop.

Subject:
Preserve the reference model exactly: same oval face, warm medium-brown skin tone, short natural black curls, straight eyebrows, almond-shaped dark eyes, beauty mark under the left eye, lean athletic build, and body proportions. Change only the outfit to a streetwear rain look: matte navy rain shell, cropped silver-gray hoodie, relaxed black cargo pants, waterproof ankle sneakers, and a compact crossbody bag.

Important details:
Identity lock is the main test. Do not alter face, age, skin tone, hair, body, height, or facial proportions. Keep realistic wet fabric, rain beads, garment drape, natural standing pose, and the same person-like presence from the reference card.

Use case:
Third image in a reference-dependent virtual try-on series, testing wardrobe and environment change while preserving synthetic model identity.

Constraints:
PRESERVE the reference model identity exactly. Change only clothing, shoes, bag, and setting. No readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no face retouching, no body shape changes, no distorted hands or feet, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Streetwear Rain Look
description: The same synthetic model wears a navy rain-shell streetwear look.

generation.runner_notes: Fanout variation; queue injects the 01 runtime URL as --ref.
